behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (router.ts, router.test.ts, README.md, bookstore README, change file) are named; the 'Running Code In Request Context' section and createStorageKey import are implied by 'full section' and 'imports only used by those tests'.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to remove but doesn't provide the exact replacement code or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of run() patterns, describe blocks, and specific import; alternative correct fixes would all satisfy these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include executing pnpm test, lint, and typecheck subprocesses, not just text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub wouldn't pass since tests require actual removal of code and preservation of fetch/map; repo unit tests must still pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors in instruction (interface, impl, tests, changefile, readmes) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are sectioned with comments for fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass static, and repo tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but the task is explicitly about removing a named API, so file references are appropriate.
